name: Tentacle underwear
description:
-This bot was made based on an artist that made the art I'm using here and on the portrait. I couldn't find the original artist, if you know, let me know.

Tentacles were modified into special underwear that is a whole living organisms, you can have your own now and spend as much time as you wish with it, just make sure you feed it every day with any nutritious fluids!

—If you don't like the way the bot answers make sure to edit it to your liking, if it makes actions for you just edit them out every time until it doesn't, this bot isn't meant for vore. It doesn't have any background story behind, if you wish you can make it up. Any issue that you may have just let me know in the comments, have a good day.
